reviews.review_description: Awesome way of demonstrating VR
Static ruins it. Shame because it's a decent little demo.
Sound is crackling and cliping on Oculus Go. Gfx could be better and no 360 3d video example.

reviews.review_title: Premium priced product, poor punch per £
reviews.review_description: Its high production quality earned the extra star. It should be the first VR presentation a newcomer experience, there's not enough of it there to ask for payment though.
I can't believe that I can't install this!! I keep getting an error message saying install failed.
This is a great peek into vr.  Idk why there are negative reviews it is free and I personally had no problems with it
Perfect demo to show the possibilities of VR
Has a bunch of cool scenes and even Francis aka boogie from YouTube.
Was skeptical about forking out £1.50 for just a walk through but must admit, this will be the first thing to show friends and family for a taster of VR.
Really nice VR Experince. Can have 5 Stars. But the Sound Problems with Oculus Go are broken the Illusion totaly. Pls Fix that! Than 5 Stars is easy.
It's free and reminds me of an old ride at Epcot.
This app does not load. Crashes on starting.  Paid money for nothing!!

If you’ve just purchased your VR headset, it may seem counterintuitive to seek out a mere general demo, even if it is free. Surely you’re wanting the good stuff right out of the box. I totally get it. And yet, this title is completely worth downloading. Not only is it neat to experience for yourself, but it is a truly remarkable sneak preview for those around you who are curious what this VR stuff is all about. It demonstrates numerous genres and possibilities, and structures it all into a narrative thread with cohesion and imagination. It is not very long; it is just a demo after all. But as far as demos go, it is near flawless, it brims with excitement, and is one that belongs in every library.

I would rate this higher if I didn't have to pay $2. I think this should have been a video Samsung provided for free to show how cool VR can be, because it is a cool experience if not a little too short. I take nothing away from the voice-over actor, because I loved The Stanley Parable Project. More of that guy in VR!

Love the presentation.  Simple but effective graphics.  On the oculus Go there is static that gets really bad.  Worry about the speakers in the unit.  It’s a shame really, this was going to be the perfect demo for some seniors, but the static kills it.
Was a smooth demonstration of what VR is all about! Sound was great on my Oculus Go. I highly recommend this app.
Great VR demo, but in an oculus go you get an awful static sound both at the start when the male character appears in front and during the space scene.

reviews.review_title: Great to introduce VR (Oculus Go user)
reviews.review_description:
I was entertained by this journey through a VR, explains clearly to anyone what VR is and how can it be used. It's done very well and with great ideas and nice narrative talk. A musthave in your app library. 
True about the audio issue, can be noticed especially in the planetary travel part. The graphics could be improved by a higher resolution. And an advice: in order to make this experiences more realistic, add (even static) legs and body on the armchair so that we imagine it's really us:-) . It doesn't cost you anything but it always helps in vr apps. Will show this to others in order to better explain what a VR glass can be good for.

This was a really cool experience as much as I’d like for u to be able to do something in it it’s really just supposed to be a welcome to virtual reality so it doesn’t really matter but this was amazing I hope u guys can make more like this.
Not something you can interactive with but a very nice, short, experience to introduce you to vr.
